column2: Verification of Remote Pilot's Use and Maintenance of FSTD During Training Sessions
column3: ['Verify that an FSTD has been implemented by the operator. ', 'Observe remote pilots during training sessions to ensure they are using the FSTD. ', 'Assess whether remote pilots are misusing the FSTD during training sessions. ']
column4: ['The presence of a functional FSTD is confirmed. ', 'Remote pilots are observed using the FSTD during their training sessions. ', "No evidence of misuse is found while observing remote pilots' interactions with the FSTD during training sessions. "]
